sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Income Tax (Amendment) Short title and
sections.text:
Act, 2016, and shall be read as one with the Income Tax Act, in commence-
ment
this Act referred to as the principal Act.
Cap. 323
(2) This Act shall come into operation on 1st June, 2016.

sections.heading: The Ninth Schedule to the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
sections.text:
deletion of Part I and the substitution therefor of the new Part set of Ninth
Schedule
out in the Appendix.

sections.heading: The Charging Schedule to the principal Act is amended in Amendment
sections.text:
paragraph 3 by— to
Charging
(a) the deletion of subparagraphs (f) and (g) and the substitution Schedule
therefor of the following:
(f) on income from mining operations, at the rate of
thirty percent; and
(b) by the re-numbering of paragraph (h) as paragraph (g).
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K4.00

PART I
Type of Vehicle Amount of tax per Vehicle
(Seating Capacity) (Per annum)
